content.question: The precise causal decomposition between the 1999 reform's structural effect (unified intake) versus its resource/composition effects (investment and teacher change) remains uncertain; even Jakubowski et al.'s two-thirds/one-third split is an estimate and could shift with different methodologies.
content.reduction_path: Controlled variation in implementation timing or intensity across regions, or new difference-in-differences analysis on cohort-level PISA data with explicit separators for resource spending and teacher composition.
